<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
<title>OAK IT Solutions &amp; Supplies — Company Profile</title>
<meta name="description" content="Company profile of OAK IT Solutions and Supplies Ltd — IT consulting, cybersecurity, infrastructure, software development, managed services, automation & AI, and training. Kampala, Uganda. Est. 2015.">
<link rel="icon" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<style>
:root{
  --pine:#0d3226; --pine-deep:#081f17; --pine-2:#155239; --moss:#79b394;
  --paper:#f5f3ec; --paper-2:#eae7db; --ink:#1a2620; --ink-soft:#4b584f;
  --gold:#c9973b; --gold-bright:#e3b154; --gold-soft:#f2c879;
  --line:rgba(13,50,38,.16); --line-l:rgba(245,243,236,.16);
  --serif:Georgia,'Times New Roman','Liberation Serif',serif;
  --sans:'Segoe UI','Avenir Next','Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;
  --mono:'Cascadia Mono',Consolas,Menlo,'Liberation Mono','Courier New',monospace;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:var(--sans);color:var(--ink);background:var(--paper);line-height:1.6;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
img{max-width:100%;display:block}
a{color:inherit}

/* ---------- ambient textures ---------- */
.dark{color:var(--paper);background:
  radial-gradient(1100px 520px at 88% -10%, rgba(227,177,84,.12), transparent 60%),
  radial-gradient(900px 620px at -12% 112%, rgba(121,179,148,.12), transparent 55%),
  linear-gradient(158deg,#0f3a2c,#081f17)}
.dark::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
  background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(245,243,236,.045) 1px,transparent 1px),
                   linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(245,243,236,.045) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:46px 46px}
.paper{background:
  linear-gradient(rgba(13,50,38,.035) 1px,transparent 1px) 0 0/100% 36px,
  var(--paper)}
section{position:relative}
.wrap{max-width:1160px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 clamp(20px,4vw,44px);position:relative;z-index:1}

/* ---------- reveal + motion ---------- */
.rv{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px);transition:opacity .7s ease,transform .7s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1)}
.rv.in{opacity:1;transform:none}
.rv.d1{transition-delay:.08s}.rv.d2{transition-delay:.16s}.rv.d3{transition-delay:.24s}.rv.d4{transition-delay:.32s}

/* ---------- progress + nav ---------- */
#prog{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:3px;width:0;background:var(--gold);z-index:80}
nav{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:70;background:rgba(8,31,23,.94);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line-l)}
.navin{max-width:1160px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 clamp(16px,3vw,44px);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:22px;height:56px}
.brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font:700 13px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--gold-bright);text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap}
.brand img{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(227,177,84,.5)}
.links{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-left:auto;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none}
.links::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.links a{font:600 10.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.13em;color:rgba(245,243,236,.72);text-decoration:none;padding:8px 9px;white-space:nowrap;
  background:linear-gradient(var(--gold-bright),var(--gold-bright)) bottom left/0 2px no-repeat;transition:color .25s,background-size .3s}
.links a:hover{color:var(--gold-soft);background-size:100% 2px}
.navbtn{font:700 10.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.12em;color:#081f17;background:var(--gold);border:0;border-radius:999px;padding:9px 16px;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;transition:.25s}
.navbtn:hover{background:var(--gold-soft);transform:translateY(-1px)}

/* ---------- cover ---------- */
.cover{min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;overflow:hidden}
.topstrip{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:22px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line-l);
  font:600 10.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.16em;color:rgba(245,243,236,.66)}
.covergrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:7fr 4.4fr;gap:clamp(28px,5vw,72px);align-items:end;padding:clamp(40px,7vh,84px) 0}
.eyebrow{font:700 11.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold-bright);margin-bottom:22px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}
.eyebrow::after{content:"";height:1px;width:70px;background:var(--gold)}
h1.wordmark{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:700;font-size:clamp(2.9rem,7.4vw,5.9rem);line-height:.98;letter-spacing:-.015em}
h1.wordmark em{font-style:normal;color:var(--gold-bright)}
.wordsub{font:600 clamp(.8rem,1.6vw,1.02rem) var(--mono);letter-spacing:.42em;color:rgba(245,243,236,.85);margin-top:16px;text-transform:uppercase}
.tagline{font-family:var(--serif);font-style:italic;font-size:clamp(1.05rem,2vw,1.35rem);color:rgba(245,243,236,.88);max-width:34em;margin-top:26px;border-left:3px solid var(--gold);padding-left:16px}
.facts{border:1px solid var(--line-l);background:rgba(8,31,23,.55);padding:26px 26px 12px;position:relative}
.facts h2{font:700 11px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.28em;color:var(--gold-bright);margin-bottom:14px}
.facts dl{display:block}
.frow{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;padding:9px 0;border-bottom:1px dashed rgba(245,243,236,.18)}
.frow:last-child{border-bottom:0}
.frow dt{font:600 10px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.14em;color:rgba(245,243,236,.55);text-transform:uppercase;padding-top:3px;white-space:nowrap}
.frow dd{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:.95rem;text-align:right;color:var(--paper)}
.corner::before,.corner::after{content:"";position:absolute;width:15px;height:15px;border:2px solid var(--gold)}
.corner::before{top:-2px;left:-2px;border-right:0;border-bottom:0}
.corner::after{bottom:-2px;right:-2px;border-left:0;border-top:0}
.coverfoot{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;padding:0 0 34px}
.chip{font:700 10.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.14em;border:1px solid rgba(227,177,84,.55);color:var(--gold-soft);border-radius:999px;padding:8px 15px}
.chip b{color:var(--paper)}
.scrollhint{margin-left:auto;font:600 10px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.22em;color:rgba(245,243,236,.5);animation:bob 2.4s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes bob{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(6px)}}

/* ---------- section headers ---------- */
.sec{padding:clamp(64px,9vh,110px) 0}
.sechead{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:20px;margin-bottom:14px}
.sechead .idx{font:700 13px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--gold)}
.sechead h2{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(1.9rem,3.8vw,2.9rem);letter-spacing:-.01em;line-height:1.05}
.sechead .rule{flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--line);align-self:center}
.dark .sechead .rule{background:var(--line-l)}
.secsub{font:600 11px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:clamp(30px,5vh,52px)}
.dark .secsub{color:rgba(245,243,236,.6)}

/* ---------- overview ---------- */
.ovgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:6.2fr 5fr;gap:clamp(26px,4vw,56px);align-items:start}
.lead{font-size:clamp(1.02rem,1.5vw,1.16rem);color:var(--ink-soft)}
.lead strong{color:var(--ink)}
.dropcap::first-letter{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:3.4em;float:left;line-height:.82;padding:4px 10px 0 0;color:var(--pine)}
.mv{display:grid;gap:16px}
.mvcard{padding:24px 26px;border:1px solid var(--line);position:relative;transition:transform .3s,box-shadow .3s}
.mvcard:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 16px 34px rgba(13,50,38,.14)}
.mvcard.mission{background:#fff;border-left:4px solid var(--gold)}
.mvcard.vision{background:var(--pine);color:var(--paper);border-left:4px solid var(--gold-bright)}
.mvcard h3{font:700 10.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.26em;margin-bottom:10px;color:var(--gold)}
.mvcard.vision h3{color:var(--gold-bright)}
.mvcard p{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.02rem;line-height:1.55}
.why{margin-top:clamp(36px,6vh,60px);border-top:1px solid var(--line)}
.whyrow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:90px 260px 1fr;gap:18px;align-items:baseline;padding:20px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);transition:background .3s,padding-left .3s}
.whyrow:hover{background:rgba(201,151,59,.07);padding-left:10px}
.whyrow .n{font:700 15px var(--mono);color:var(--gold)}
.whyrow h4{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.25rem}
.whyrow p{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:.97rem}

/* ---------- stats band ---------- */
.stats{border-top:1px solid var(--line-l);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line-l)}
.statgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:0}
.stat{padding:clamp(30px,5vh,52px) 22px;border-left:1px solid var(--line-l);text-align:left}
.stat:first-child{border-left:0}
.stat .num{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(2.4rem,4.6vw,3.6rem);color:var(--gold-bright);line-height:1}
.stat .num sup{font-size:.5em;color:var(--moss)}
.stat .lbl{font:600 10.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(245,243,236,.66);margin-top:10px}

/* ---------- services ---------- */
.svc{display:grid;grid-template-columns:96px 1fr;gap:clamp(16px,3vw,36px);padding:26px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--line);position:relative;transition:background .3s}
.svc:last-of-type{border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
.svc::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:var(--gold);transform:scaleY(0);transform-origin:top;transition:transform .35s}
.svc:hover{background:rgba(201,151,59,.06)}
.svc:hover::before{transform:scaleY(1)}
.svc .no{font:700 clamp(1.4rem,2.6vw,2rem) var(--mono);color:transparent;-webkit-text-stroke:1.2px var(--gold);padding-top:2px}
.svc h3{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(1.25rem,2.2vw,1.6rem);margin-bottom:8px}
.svc p{color:var(--ink-soft);max-width:56em;font-size:.98rem}
.tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:7px;margin-top:12px}
.tag{font:600 9.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.12em;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:999px;padding:4px 10px;color:var(--pine);background:#fff;transition:.25s}
.svc:hover .tag{border-color:rgba(201,151,59,.5)}

/* ---------- journey ---------- */
.jgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:5fr 7fr;gap:clamp(28px,5vw,70px)}
.jnote{font-family:var(--serif);font-style:italic;font-size:1.1rem;color:rgba(245,243,236,.85);border-left:3px solid var(--gold);padding-left:16px}
.tl{position:relative;padding-left:34px}
.tl::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:8px;top:6px;bottom:6px;width:1px;background:linear-gradient(var(--gold),rgba(227,177,84,.15))}
.tli{position:relative;padding:0 0 30px}
.tli:last-child{padding-bottom:0}
.tli::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:-31px;top:6px;width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--pine-deep);border:2px solid var(--gold-bright)}
.tli .ph{font:700 10.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.24em;color:var(--gold-bright)}
.tli h4{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.28rem;margin:6px 0 4px;color:var(--paper)}
.tli p{color:rgba(245,243,236,.72);font-size:.96rem;max-width:44em}

/* ---------- leadership ---------- */
.leadgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:4.6fr 6.6fr;gap:clamp(26px,4vw,60px);align-items:start}
.person{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);padding:30px;position:relative}
.mono-badge{width:86px;height:86px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--pine);color:var(--gold-bright);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.02em;border:2px solid var(--gold);margin-bottom:20px}
.person h3{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.7rem;line-height:1.15}
.person .role{font:700 10.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin:8px 0 16px}
.person p{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:.96rem}
.subh{font:700 11px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.26em;color:var(--gold);margin:0 0 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.subh::after{content:"";flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--line)}
.certs{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:34px}
.cert{font:600 9.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.1em;background:var(--pine);color:var(--paper);border-radius:3px;padding:6px 11px;transition:.25s}
.cert:hover{background:var(--pine-2);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.xp{list-style:none}
.xp li{display:grid;grid-template-columns:150px 1fr;gap:14px;padding:11px 0;border-bottom:1px dashed var(--line);font-size:.95rem}
.xp li:last-child{border-bottom:0}
.xp .yrs{font:700 10.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--pine);padding-top:2px}
.xp b{display:block;font-weight:600}
.xp span{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:.88rem}

/* ---------- clients ---------- */
.clients{counter-reset:cl}
.crow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:64px 1fr auto;gap:18px;align-items:center;padding:18px 6px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line-l);transition:background .3s,padding-left .3s}
.crow:hover{background:rgba(227,177,84,.06);padding-left:16px}
.crow .ci{font:700 13px var(--mono);color:rgba(245,243,236,.45)}
.crow h4{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(1.1rem,2vw,1.45rem);color:var(--paper)}
.sector{font:700 9.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.18em;color:var(--gold-bright);border:1px solid rgba(227,177,84,.45);border-radius:999px;padding:6px 13px;white-space:nowrap}

/* ---------- gallery ---------- */
.galgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:18px}
.tile{background:linear-gradient(150deg,#0f3a2c,#081f17);border:1px solid var(--line-l);position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:transform .35s,box-shadow .35s,border-color .35s}
.tile:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:0 22px 44px rgba(4,18,12,.5);border-color:rgba(227,177,84,.5)}
.tile .art{aspect-ratio:4/3;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:8%;
  background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(245,243,236,.05) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(245,243,236,.05) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:22px 22px}
.tile svg{width:100%;height:auto}
.gal .a{stroke:var(--gold-bright);stroke-width:2.2;fill:none;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;transition:stroke .3s}
.gal .b{stroke:var(--moss);stroke-width:1.5;fill:none;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;opacity:.9;transition:stroke .3s}
.gal .f{fill:var(--gold-bright)}
.gal .dash{stroke-dasharray:4 5}
.gal .svglabel{font:600 8.5px Consolas,monospace;fill:var(--moss);letter-spacing:.14em}
.tile:hover .a{stroke:var(--gold-soft)}
.tile:hover .b{stroke:#a5d4bb}
.tcap{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:13px 16px;border-top:1px solid var(--line-l);background:rgba(4,18,12,.55)}
.tcap h4{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1rem;color:var(--paper)}
.tcap .k{font:700 8.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--gold-bright);white-space:nowrap}
.galnote{margin-top:20px;font:italic 500 .92rem var(--serif);color:rgba(245,243,236,.6)}

/* ---------- CSR + future ---------- */
.csr{display:grid;gap:0;border-top:1px solid var(--line)}
.csrrow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:70px 1fr;gap:20px;padding:24px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);align-items:start;transition:padding-left .3s}
.csrrow:hover{padding-left:10px}
.csrrow svg{width:44px;height:44px;margin-top:4px}
.csrrow .ic{stroke:var(--pine);stroke-width:1.7;fill:none;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}
.csrrow .icf{fill:var(--gold)}
.csrrow h4{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:4px}
.csrrow p{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:.97rem;max-width:52em}
.future{margin-top:clamp(40px,7vh,64px);background:var(--pine);color:var(--paper);padding:clamp(28px,4vw,46px);position:relative}
.future h3{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(1.4rem,2.6vw,1.9rem);margin-bottom:22px}
.fgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:16px 34px}
.fitem{display:flex;gap:14px;padding:14px 0;border-top:1px dashed var(--line-l)}
.fitem .fn{font:700 13px var(--mono);color:var(--gold-bright)}
.fitem p{color:rgba(245,243,236,.85);font-size:.95rem}

/* ---------- contact ---------- */
.contact h2.big{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(2.1rem,5vw,3.6rem);line-height:1.08;max-width:14em}
.contact h2.big em{font-style:normal;color:var(--gold-bright)}
.cgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--line-l);border:1px solid var(--line-l);margin-top:clamp(34px,6vh,58px)}
.ccell{background:rgba(8,31,23,.6);padding:26px 24px;transition:background .3s}
.ccell:hover{background:rgba(21,82,57,.55)}
.ccell .k{font:700 10px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.26em;color:var(--gold-bright);margin-bottom:12px}
.ccell p{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1rem;color:var(--paper);line-height:1.5;word-break:break-word}
.ccell a{text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(227,177,84,.5);transition:.25s}
.ccell a:hover{color:var(--gold-soft);border-color:var(--gold-soft)}
.legal{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px 26px;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:34px;padding-top:22px;border-top:1px solid var(--line-l);
  font:600 10px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.14em;color:rgba(245,243,236,.55)}

/* ---------- floating print button ---------- */
.printbtn{position:fixed;right:22px;bottom:22px;z-index:90;background:var(--gold);color:#081f17;border:0;border-radius:999px;
  font:700 11.5px var(--mono);letter-spacing:.14em;padding:14px 22px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 12px 30px rgba(4,18,12,.4);transition:.25s}
.printbtn:hover{background:var(--gold-soft);transform:translateY(-3px)}

/* ---------- responsive ---------- */
@media (max-width:960px){
  .covergrid,.ovgrid,.jgrid,.leadgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .statgrid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .stat:nth-child(3){border-left:0}
  .stat{border-top:1px solid var(--line-l)}
  .stat:nth-child(-n+2){border-top:0}
  .galgrid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .cgrid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .whyrow{grid-template-columns:60px 1fr}
  .whyrow p{grid-column:2}
}
@media (max-width:600px){
  .galgrid,.cgrid,.fgrid,.statgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .stat{border-left:0}
  .xp li{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .crow{grid-template-columns:40px 1fr}
  .sector{grid-column:2;justify-self:start}
}

@page{size:A4;margin:0}
@media print{
  *{-webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;print-color-adjust:exact;animation:none!important;transition:none!important}
  html{scroll-behavior:auto}
  .rv{opacity:1!important;transform:none!important}
  nav,#prog,.printbtn,.scrollhint,.no-print{display:none!important}
  body{background:#fff}
  .cover{min-height:0;padding-bottom:10mm}
  .sec{padding:12mm 0}
  .pg{break-before:page}
  .avoid{break-inside:avoid}
  .mvcard:hover,.svc:hover,.tile:hover,.crow:hover,.whyrow:hover{transform:none;box-shadow:none}
  .galgrid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .statgrid{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}
  .cgrid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  a{border-bottom:none}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="prog"></div>
<nav class="no-print"><div class="navin"><a class="brand" href="#top"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="OAK IT logo">OAK IT</a><div class="links"><a href="#overview">OVERVIEW</a><a href="#services">SERVICES</a><a href="#journey">JOURNEY</a><a href="#leadership">LEADERSHIP</a><a href="#clients">CLIENTS</a><a href="#gallery">GALLERY</a><a href="#csr">CSR</a><a href="#contact">CONTACT</a></div><button class="navbtn" data-print>&#11015; SAVE AS PDF</button></div></nav>
<header class="cover dark" id="top"><div class="wrap"><div class="topstrip"><span>COMPANY PROFILE &middot; KAMPALA, UGANDA</span><span>EST. 2015 &middot; REG 80010000953729 &middot; TIN 1009657242</span></div><div class="covergrid"><div class="rv in"><p class="eyebrow">INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY &middot; SINCE 2015</p><h1 class="wordmark">OAK IT<br>Solutions <em>&amp;</em> Supplies</h1><p class="wordsub">Consult &middot; Build &middot; Secure &middot; Support</p><p class="tagline">Revolutionizing business through cutting-edge technology solutions — helping organizations cut costs, increase efficiency and grow their return on investment.</p></div><aside class="facts corner rv in d1"><h2>KEY FACTS</h2><dl><div class="frow"><dt>Founded</dt><dd>2015 &middot; Kampala, Uganda</dd></div><div class="frow"><dt>Founders</dt><dd>Ms. Beatrice Baguma<br>Mr. Kenneth Okello</dd></div><div class="frow"><dt>Reg No.</dt><dd>80010000953729</dd></div><div class="frow"><dt>TIN</dt><dd>1009657242</dd></div><div class="frow"><dt>Bank</dt><dd>Bank of Africa &ndash; Ntinda</dd></div><div class="frow"><dt>Head Office</dt><dd>Plot 246 Kyebando Central Rd,<br>next to Total Bahai, Kampala</dd></div></dl></aside></div><div class="coverfoot"><span class="chip"><b>100+</b> CLIENTS SERVED</span><span class="chip"><b>10+</b> YEARS EXPERIENCE</span><span class="chip"><b>24/7</b> MONITORING &amp; SUPPORT</span><span class="scrollhint">SCROLL &#8595;</span></div></div></header>
<section class="sec paper" id="overview"><div class="wrap"><div class="sechead rv"><span class="idx">01</span><h2>Company Overview</h2><span class="rule"></span></div><p class="secsub rv">Who we are &middot; Mission &middot; Vision</p><div class="ovgrid"><p class="lead dropcap rv">OAK IT Solutions and Supplies, established in <strong>2015</strong>, is a leading Information Technology legal entity based in <strong>Kampala, Uganda</strong>. The company is dedicated to providing top-notch IT solutions and addressing complex business challenges. By leveraging the power of technology and innovation, OAK IT Solutions aims to help organizations <strong>cut costs, increase efficiency</strong>, and ultimately improve their <strong>Return on Investment (ROI)</strong>.</p><div class="mv"><div class="mvcard mission rv d1"><h3>OUR MISSION</h3><p>To provide exceptional value for every dollar spent, and to exceed our own expectations as well as those of our clients.</p></div><div class="mvcard vision rv d2"><h3>OUR VISION</h3><p>To revolutionize the business landscape by integrating cutting-edge technology solutions.</p></div></div></div><div class="why"><div class="whyrow rv"><span class="n">A&mdash;01</span><h4>Customer Service</h4><p>Exceptional customer support and dedicated service teams.</p></div><div class="whyrow rv d1"><span class="n">A&mdash;02</span><h4>Commitment to Quality</h4><p>Commitment to delivering high-quality services and products.</p></div><div class="whyrow rv d2"><span class="n">A&mdash;03</span><h4>Continuous Innovation</h4><p>Continuously evolving technology solutions that drive business growth.</p></div></div></div></section>
<section class="stats dark"><div class="wrap"><div class="statgrid"><div class="stat"><div class="num"><span class="count" data-to="100">0</span><sup>+</sup></div><div class="lbl">Clients Served</div></div><div class="stat"><div class="num"><span class="count" data-to="10">0</span><sup>+</sup></div><div class="lbl">Years Experience</div></div><div class="stat"><div class="num"><span class="count" data-to="6">0</span></div><div class="lbl">Service Lines</div></div><div class="stat"><div class="num">24<sup>/7</sup></div><div class="lbl">Monitoring &amp; Support</div></div></div></div></section>
<section class="sec paper pg" id="services"><div class="wrap"><div class="sechead rv"><span class="idx">02</span><h2>Our Services</h2><span class="rule"></span></div><p class="secsub rv">Six practice areas &middot; one accountable partner</p><div class="svc rv"><span class="no">01</span><div><h3>IT Consulting &amp; Cybersecurity</h3><p>Business IT consulting, cloud computing solutions, cybersecurity solutions, network security assessments, firewall configuration, intrusion detection and prevention systems, and compliance support (ISO, GDPR).</p><div class="tags"><span class="tag">CLOUD COMPUTING</span><span class="tag">FIREWALLS</span><span class="tag">IDS / IPS</span><span class="tag">ISO &amp; GDPR COMPLIANCE</span><span class="tag">SECURITY ASSESSMENTS</span></div></div></div><div class="svc rv"><span class="no">02</span><div><h3>IT Infrastructure &amp; Collaboration</h3><p>Network design &amp; implementation, server installation &amp; configuration, storage solutions, email hosting, collaboration platforms, intranet development, and knowledge management systems.</p><div class="tags"><span class="tag">NETWORK DESIGN</span><span class="tag">SERVER INSTALLATION</span><span class="tag">STORAGE</span><span class="tag">EMAIL HOSTING</span><span class="tag">INTRANET</span></div></div></div><div class="svc rv"><span class="no">03</span><div><h3>Software Development</h3><p>Custom software development, mobile app development, enterprise applications, web development, CMS development, and e-commerce solutions.</p><div class="tags"><span class="tag">WEB DEVELOPMENT</span><span class="tag">MOBILE APPS</span><span class="tag">ENTERPRISE SYSTEMS</span><span class="tag">CMS</span><span class="tag">E-COMMERCE</span></div></div></div><div class="svc rv"><span class="no">04</span><div><h3>Managed IT Services</h3><p>24/7 monitoring &amp; alerting, proactive maintenance, backup management, priority response SLAs, dedicated account manager, custom integrations, remote troubleshooting, and monthly health reports.</p><div class="tags"><span class="tag">24/7 MONITORING</span><span class="tag">BACKUP MANAGEMENT</span><span class="tag">PRIORITY SLAs</span><span class="tag">REMOTE SUPPORT</span><span class="tag">HEALTH REPORTS</span></div></div></div><div class="svc rv"><span class="no">05</span><div><h3>Automation &amp; AI</h3><p>Workflow automation, collaboration tools, business process optimization, AI chatbots for customer support, predictive analytics, machine learning for data analysis, and database design &amp; management.</p><div class="tags"><span class="tag">AI CHATBOTS</span><span class="tag">WORKFLOW AUTOMATION</span><span class="tag">PREDICTIVE ANALYTICS</span><span class="tag">MACHINE LEARNING</span><span class="tag">DATABASE DESIGN</span></div></div></div><div class="svc rv"><span class="no">06</span><div><h3>Digital Marketing &amp; Training</h3><p>Content strategy &amp; planning, social media marketing campaigns, IT training &amp; certifications consultation, lab-based pragmatic training, project-based team training, and Full Stack Bootcamp.</p><div class="tags"><span class="tag">CONTENT STRATEGY</span><span class="tag">SOCIAL CAMPAIGNS</span><span class="tag">IT CERTIFICATIONS</span><span class="tag">FULL STACK BOOTCAMP</span><span class="tag">TEAM TRAINING</span></div></div></div></div></section>
<section class="sec dark pg" id="journey"><div class="wrap"><div class="sechead rv"><span class="idx">03</span><h2>Our Journey</h2><span class="rule"></span></div><p class="secsub rv">A decade of building trust, one installation at a time</p><div class="jgrid"><p class="jnote rv">From a two-founder startup in Kyebando to a full-stack technology partner serving aviation, insurance, non-profit, education and sports institutions across Uganda.</p><div class="tl"><div class="tli rv"><span class="ph">2015 &middot; FOUNDING</span><h4>The mission begins</h4><p>Company founded with a mission to revolutionize IT solutions.</p></div><div class="tli rv d1"><span class="ph">GROWTH &middot; CLOUD</span><h4>Cloud computing launched</h4><p>Launched comprehensive cloud computing services.</p></div><div class="tli rv d2"><span class="ph">EXPANSION &middot; SECURITY</span><h4>Cybersecurity practice</h4><p>Expanded services to include advanced cybersecurity solutions.</p></div><div class="tli rv d3"><span class="ph">TODAY &middot; SCALE</span><h4>100+ clients and counting</h4><p>Reached over 100 clients in supplies, installation, and support, showcasing trust and reliability.</p></div></div></div></div></section>
<section class="sec paper pg" id="leadership"><div class="wrap"><div class="sechead rv"><span class="idx">04</span><h2>Leadership</h2><span class="rule"></span></div><p class="secsub rv">Hands-on experience from the server room to the boardroom</p><div class="leadgrid"><div class="person corner rv avoid"><div class="mono-badge">OK</div><h3>Okello Kenneth George</h3><p class="role">Co-Founder &amp; Managing Director / CEO</p><p>Okello Kenneth George is a highly experienced IT professional with a diverse background encompassing IT Consulting, Systems Administration, Cyber Security, Systems Analysis, and Systems Development. He is a co-founder and the Chief Executive Officer of OAK IT Solutions and Supplies Ltd, a role he has held since January 2015.</p></div><div><h4 class="subh rv">CERTIFICATIONS &amp; SKILLS</h4><div class="certs rv"><span class="cert">ISC2 &middot; CERTIFIED IN CYBERSECURITY</span><span class="cert">CISCO CCNA ROUTING &amp; SWITCHING</span><span class="cert">CCNA SECURITY</span><span class="cert">COMPTIA IT FUNDAMENTALS</span><span class="cert">OPSWAT FILE SECURITY ASSOCIATE</span><span class="cert">NIST 800-171 COMPLIANCE</span><span class="cert">CRITICAL INFRASTRUCTURE PROTECTION</span><span class="cert">IT &amp; CYBER RISK MANAGEMENT</span><span class="cert">PROMPT ENGINEERING &middot; GENAI</span><span class="cert">MONGODB &amp; PYTHON</span><span class="cert">JAVASCRIPT &middot; BOOTSTRAP &middot; PHP</span><span class="cert">ADOBE XD DESIGN</span></div><h4 class="subh rv">PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE</h4><ul class="xp rv"><li><span class="yrs">2015 &mdash; PRESENT</span><div><b>Chief Executive Officer</b><span>OAK IT Solutions and Supplies Ltd</span></div></li><li><span class="yrs">2015 &mdash; PRESENT</span><div><b>IT Support Manager</b><span>Hillcrest Insurance Brokers</span></div></li><li><span class="yrs">2014 &mdash; PRESENT</span><div><b>IT Management</b><span>Uganda Debt Network</span></div></li><li><span class="yrs">2021 &mdash; PRESENT</span><div><b>Senior Network Architect</b><span>Bar Aviation</span></div></li><li><span class="yrs">2023 &mdash; PRESENT</span><div><b>Senior Network Architect</b><span>Uganda Sports Arena</span></div></li><li><span class="yrs">2012 &mdash; 2017</span><div><b>Senior IT Support Engineer</b><span>2MCL</span></div></li><li><span class="yrs">2005 &mdash; 2008</span><div><b>Network Engineer</b><span>Data Net</span></div></li></ul></div></div></div></section>

<script>
(function(){
  var io=new IntersectionObserver(function(es){es.forEach(function(e){if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('in');io.unobserve(e.target);}});},{threshold:.12});
  document.querySelectorAll('.rv').forEach(function(el){io.observe(el);});
  function animCount(el){var to=+el.getAttribute('data-to'),t0=null,dur=1500;
    function f(t){if(!t0)t0=t;var p=Math.min(1,(t-t0)/dur),e=1-Math.pow(1-p,3);
      el.textContent=Math.round(to*e);if(p<1)requestAnimationFrame(f);}
    requestAnimationFrame(f);}
  var cio=new IntersectionObserver(function(es){es.forEach(function(e){if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.querySelectorAll('.count').forEach(animCount);cio.unobserve(e.target);}});},{threshold:.3});
  document.querySelectorAll('.statgrid').forEach(function(el){cio.observe(el);});
  var prog=document.getElementById('prog');
  window.addEventListener('scroll',function(){
    var h=document.documentElement.scrollHeight-window.innerHeight;
    prog.style.width=(h>0?(window.scrollY/h)*100:0)+'%';
  },{passive:true});
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-print]').forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener('click',function(){window.print();});});
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
